name: Grand Alliance Death: Dark Majesty
inspire: If an enemy fighter is slain while a Locus of Shyish ability is persisting, Inspire a number of friendly fighters equal to that enemy fighter's Bounty characteristic.

abilities.name: Locus of Shyish
abilities.rulesText:
Roll 3 Attack dice. If the roll contains 1 of the results on the Locus of Shyish table, immediately use the relevant ability. That ability persists until the end of the battle round. If the roll contains any {icon:crit}, you can replace each {icon:crit} with another symbol of your choice ({icon:fury}, {icon:dodge}, {icon:shield} or {icon:skull}).

The same fighter cannot be picked to be affected by a Locus of Shyish ability more than once per battle round.

abilities.name: Blades of Shyish
abilities.flavorText: The weapons of the dead are imbued with a murderous amethyst energy.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter. That fighter's melee weapons have Critical Grievous ({icon:crit}{icon:grievous}).

abilities.name: Spirit Gale
abilities.flavorText: Howling spectral winds come forth to lend speed to an ally.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter. That fighter has +1 Move.

abilities.name: Prison of Grief
abilities.flavorText: Waves of sorrow cascade across the field, cursing the foe to endlessly relive their darkest moment.
abilities.rulesText: Pick an enemy fighter. That fighter's weapons have -1 Attack dice.

abilities.name: Spectral Grasp
abilities.flavorText: Grasping spectral hands reach up from the earth to seize hold of enemies.
abilities.rulesText: Pick an enemy fighter. That fighter has -1 Move.
